name: camp_landing
_comment: User 2026-06-08 (#34): returning from a city lands here by plane. The propeller plane is parked at left; PP spawns beside it and walks RIGHT along the dirt strip, out the gate, into camp_grounds (which is darkened once paris_done). Open dirt foreground: foot band y~640-740, so minY=640-270=370, maxY=740-270=470. spawnY=420 -> foot ~690. A crow perches on the CAMP sign (decorateCampLanding).
